non_blocking_notes: I could not run `npm test` or `npm run check` in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Astro attempted to write temp or cache files. `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed.

The diff still commits stale audit artifacts, including `.codex/audits/security-hardening.review.json` with old DO-NOT-SHIP findings that are now fixed. That should be cleaned up or overwritten by the orchestrator record, but it is not a runtime blocker.
Existing portal files still contain pre-existing ellipses and em dashes, but member-facing strings added by this diff do not add em dashes and are plain language.

spec_compliance.criterion: SEC-1 DOB required at public join boundary
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/members.ts:218-245` requires `dobAnswer`, validates ISO date/range, rejects under-13 before Turnstile or writes, and only then calls `createPendingMember`; `createPendingMember` also requires `dobAnswer` at `convex/members.ts:260-267`.
`beforeSessionCreation` maps `minor` to `pending_guardian`, `restricted_unknown` to `pending_review`, and only issues a certificate when `next === "active"` at `convex/auth.ts:133-162`.

spec_compliance.criterion: SEC-2 rate limiting on magic-link sends
spec_compliance.evidence: All email sign-ins pass through `enforceSendLimits` in `convex/auth.ts:45-63`; constants are 3/hour, 10/day, and global 90/day in `convex/lib/rateLimit.ts:19-29`. Local package source for `@convex-dev/auth@0.0.94` shows `afterUserCreatedOrUpdated` runs before verification-code replacement, matching the transaction-safety claim.
`updateProfile` checks `_storage` metadata, allows only jpeg/png/webp, enforces 5 MB, and returns before patching on invalid photos at `convex/members.ts:175-195`.

Join consent forces explicit false and audits whenever lane is not `standard` at `convex/members.ts:313-327`; settings refuse `pipeline=true`, audit, and write no consent row unless `member_lane === "standard"` at `convex/members.ts:375-389`.

`public/_headers:19-24` includes CSP, nosniff, DENY framing, referrer policy, and permissions policy. `astro.config.mjs:17-39` rewrites Convex wildcard template origins to the deployment origin or strips them when unset.
`@convex-dev/auth` is pinned exactly to `0.0.94` in `package.json` and `package-lock.json`; `convex/auth.ts:1-3` records the reason.

spec_compliance.criterion: QA-1 unit tests exist in the repo
spec_compliance.evidence: Vitest suites cover age, member lane, lifecycle, profile validation, rate-limit windows, auth rate-limit placement, and join consent safeguards under `tests/unit` and `tests/convex`.

spec_compliance.criterion: QA-2 CI runs the type gate and unit tests
spec_compliance.evidence: `.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs `npm run check` and `npm test` before installing/running the Playwright E2E step.
No new runtime pages or design rewrites were added; runtime UI changes are limited to hardening error/status copy and profile-photo validation states.

summary: No ship-blocking security or spec-compliance issues found in the current diff. Gate 5 still needs to run in a writable environment because this read-only review sandbox could not execute Astro/Vitest.
